title: CredentialRankingStrategy
description: When a wallet holds multiple credentials that satisfy a PresentationPolicy, this strategy determines which is preferred. Used in PresentationPolicy.credential_ranking_strategy.

FRESHEST_FIRST.description: Prefer the most recently issued credential. Ties broken by trust_level.

HIGHEST_TRUST_FIRST.description: Prefer the credential whose issuer has the highest TrustProfileIssuer.trust_level. Ties broken by issuance date.

CUSTOM.description: Use PresentationPolicy.credential_ranking_weights to compute a weighted score. Supported weight keys: 'freshness' (inverse age), 'trust_level', 'compliance_status', 'format_preference'.
